creator: gnats@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

You need to ask whoever installed the FreeBSD system in the first place 
to help you.  FreeBSD itself is maintained by a set of volunteers and not 
sold as a commercial product.  (Our web site does offer a list of companies 
that offer commercial support for it, however). 

Alternatively you could try asking your question on the mailing lists 
freebsd-questions@, but you may be better off with someone on-site who 
knows the OS.
